message:
test: add BottomTabBar, FloatingActionButton, AnalyticsProvider tests

26 new tests covering mobile bottom tab bar (tab rendering, links,
search callback, menu toggle), floating action button (ARIA labels,
expand/collapse, actions, onPress), and analytics provider (page
view tracking, pricing event, time on page, web vitals init).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
